creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sat Sep  8 14:24:00 2012
New Revision: 303904
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/303904

Log:
  - Update to 2.0
  
  PR:		ports/170940
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (hartzell@alerce.com, >2 weeks)

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Sub-WrapPackages/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-Sub-WrapPackages/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/p5-Sub-WrapPackages/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Sub-WrapPackages/Makefile	Sat Sep  8 14:20:06 2012	(r303903)
+++ head/devel/p5-Sub-WrapPackages/Makefile	Sat Sep  8 14:24:00 2012	(r303904)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	Sub-WrapPackages
-PORTVERSION=	1.3
+PORTVERSION=	2.0
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
@@ -14,7 +14,9 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	hartzell@alerce.com
 COMMENT=	Add pre- and post-execution wrappers
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Hook-LexWrap>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Hook-LexWrap
+RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Hook-LexWrap>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Hook-LexWrap \
+		p5-Devel-Caller-IgnoreNamespaces>=1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Devel-Caller-IgnoreNamespaces \
+		p5-Sub-Prototype>=0.02:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Sub-Prototype
 BUILD_DEPENDS:=	${RUN_DEPENDS}
 
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes

Modified: head/devel/p5-Sub-WrapPackages/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Sub-WrapPackages/distinfo	Sat Sep  8 14:20:06 2012	(r303903)
+++ head/devel/p5-Sub-WrapPackages/distinfo	Sat Sep  8 14:24:00 2012	(r303904)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (Sub-WrapPackages-1.3.tar.gz) = 76e4905d90530bb6f67b89f9adce8055004b5cd793c29a04c268bf08fcdbcfe2
-SIZE (Sub-WrapPackages-1.3.tar.gz) = 15416
+SHA256 (Sub-WrapPackages-2.0.tar.gz) = e36a7dc356d50453bcc212a1b66aaa1bece310caf1525f8475267f065f18a50f
+SIZE (Sub-WrapPackages-2.0.tar.gz) = 18866
